final_answer: Action may not proceed. The deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 pertains to batch X-79, not the target batch X-78 specified in BATCH-XOR-078. Policy STD-XOR-078-P mandates exact match on batch, assay, acceptance criterion, and release date before release. The visible deviation DEV-XOR-078 remains unresolved for batch X-78. The source boundary remains open; release authorization is not established for the target batch.
